region.example: East Anglian Region, Scotland, North Western Region

highest_education.description: Student's prior education level before enrollment

num_of_prev_attempts.description: How many times student previously attempted this course

final_result.note: Withdrawn = student unregistered; Fail = did not meet pass criteria; Pass = successful completion

at_risk_flag.description: Early warning flag (1=flagged for intervention by institution)

registered_pre_start_days.description: Days before course start that student registered

days_until_unregistration.description: Days into course when student unregistered (if applicable)
days_until_unregistration.null_meaning: Student did not unregister / completed course

avg_assessment_score.description: Mean score across all submitted assessments (0-100 scale)

weighted_score.description: Weighted assessment score (accounts for assessment difficulty/weight)

avg_days_from_due.description: Average days early/late submissions relative to due date
avg_days_from_due.note: Negative = submitted early; positive = submitted late

late_submission_rate.description: Proportion of assessments submitted after due date

total_clicks.description: Total platform interactions (VLE clicks) over course

clicks_first_30_days.description: Platform clicks in first 30 days of enrollment

total_vle_events.description: Total VLE events (broader than clicks, includes page views, downloads, etc.)

first_activity_day.description: Days into course before first VLE activity
first_activity_day.note: Negative = active before course officially started

last_activity_day.description: Days into course of final VLE activity

activity_span_days.description: Total days from first to last VLE activity

engagement_index.description: Composite engagement score (0-100 scale) derived from VLE activity
engagement_index.calculation: Based on total clicks, early activity, consistency, and submission patterns

interpretation.0-30: Very Low - Minimal platform engagement, high withdrawal risk
interpretation.50-70: Moderate - Consistent but not intensive engagement

early_alert_risk_score.calculation: Composite of engagement_index, assessment performance, submission timeliness, and early activity

interpretation.0-30: Low Risk - High likelihood of successful completion
interpretation.30-70: Moderate Risk - Monitor and provide support as needed
interpretation.70-100: High Risk - Requires active intervention and support

data_quality_notes.completeness: Some fields may be sparse (deprivation_band, assessment scores) depending on student provision/completion
data_quality_notes.missing_values: Null = field not applicable (e.g., assessment score if no submissions)

interpretation_notes.engagement_vs_outcome: Students with engagement_index >70 rarely withdraw (95%+ completion). Engagement_index <40 predicts withdrawal in 60%+ of cases.
interpretation_notes.early_activity_signal: clicks_first_30_days <50 is strong early warning. Students inactive in first month have 6x withdrawal rate vs. active cohort.
interpretation_notes.assessment_trajectory: Students submitting 0-2 assessments (vs. 5+) have 70%+ withdrawal rate. Late submission consistent predictor of withdrawal.
interpretation_notes.equity_considerations: Lower education band (A Level vs. HE Qualification) and higher deprivation show higher risk scores — recommend targeted support.
interpretation_notes.course_variation: Risk profiles vary significantly by module_code. Some courses (e.g., technical modules) show 40% withdrawal; others 10%. Drill down by course for targeted interventions.

typical_use_cases: Identify at-risk students for proactive advising intervention
Forecast course-level withdrawal rates based on early enrollment cohort profile
Analyze which engagement metrics best predict success vs. withdrawal
Segment students by risk profile for targeted support (tutoring, advising, mentoring)
Benchmark your institution's retention drivers against open university data
A/B test intervention effectiveness by comparing risk scores before/after support
related_literature: Open University Learning Analytics Dataset (Kuzilek et al., 2015)
Xing et al. (2015) - Early Prediction of Student Failure in MOOCs
Linden (2016) - Predicting Student Performance in Distance Learning
